summary: Testing completed for individual report permissions feature. All 7 new report permissions (report_attendance_overview, report_absent_students, report_warnings, report_daily, report_student, report_course, report_teacher_workload) are working correctly.

minor.issue: Database roles needed to be updated with new permissions - roles were created before the new permissions were added. Fixed by updating roles via API.

critical_code_review_comments: The code correctly defines all 7 individual report permissions in backend/server.py
The DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS dictionary correctly assigns report permissions to each role
The ALL_PERMISSIONS list includes all 7 permissions with 'التقارير الفردية' category
Frontend reports.tsx correctly uses canViewReport() function to show/hide reports based on permissions
Frontend AuthContext.tsx includes all PERMISSIONS constants
Note: When new permissions are added, existing database roles need to be updated - this was done via API
seed_data_creation: Updated admin, teacher, employee, and student roles with new individual report permissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Individual report permissions feature is fully implemented. All 7 new permissions (report_attendance_overview, report_absent_students, report_warnings, report_daily, report_student, report_course, report_teacher_workload) are correctly configured in backend and frontend. Database roles were updated with new permissions. Backend pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_reports_permissions.py can be used for regression testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. Data migration was needed: existing roles in database didn't have the new permissions that were added to the code. Fixed by calling PUT /api/roles/{role_id} to update each role with the new permissions.
